name: Richmond
author: rslurry
description:
Uses 2023 LODES data. Coverage spans from Petersburg in the south, Midlothian in the west, Hopewell in the east, and Ashland in the north.
Includes demand for RIC airport; VCU and UR universities; Maymont, Lewis Ginter Botanical Garden, Virginia Museum of Fine Arts, and the James River Park System (split across Belle Isle, Pony Pasture, the Wetlands, Brown's Island+Potterfield Bridge, Buttermilk Trail, North Bank Trail, Texas Beach, and Ancarrow's Landing).
